# BP-159 negative variant: a renamed boolean flag is read after parsing.
lang: go
file: BP-159-variant-safe.go
variant: renamed-flag
---
package main

import (
	"flag"
	"log"
)

func main() {
	verbose := flag.Bool("verbose", false, "enable verbose output")
	flag.Parse()
	if *verbose {
		log.Println("verbose")
	}
}
